---
title: "About"
description: "About Kader Mohideen — cybersecurity solution architect."
toc: true
---

# Hi, I'm Kader 👋

Cybersecurity solution architect based in **Riyadh, Saudi Arabia**, with nearly a decade in the GCC/MENA enterprise market. My work sits at the intersection of deep security engineering and commercial presales — translating complex defensive architectures into solutions that customers actually deploy.

These days I'm bridging that foundation with **AI/ML and data science**, and this site is where I share what I'm learning along the way.

## What I do

- **Solution architecture** for multi-vendor security stacks — designing zero trust, DDI, network security, and cloud security deployments end-to-end.
- **Presales engineering** — POCs, RFP responses, technical demos, and C-level solution positioning for enterprise and government customers across KSA.
- **Hands-on security work** — a background in penetration testing, threat hunting, and SIEM engineering still shapes how I think about defense.

## What I'm into

- AI in cybersecurity — applying ML to detection, analytics, and automation
- Zero Trust and cloud security architecture
- Attack-Centric Framework (ACF) — a recurring topic on this blog
- Compliance frameworks (NIST, NCA, ISO/IEC 27001, GDPR)

## Credentials at a glance

**CISSP · CCSP · CCSK · CCZT · ECPPT V2** — plus vendor specializations across **Infoblox, Zscaler, Trend Micro, Forcepoint, OPSWAT, and Microfocus**.

Currently pursuing an **MBA in AI & Data Science** at SRM University, on top of an **AI/ML certificate from IIT Madras Pravartak** and an **M.Sc in Cloud & Enterprise Computing** from Nottingham Trent University, UK.

## Resume

📄 **[Download my CV (PDF)](files/Kader_Mohideen_CV.pdf)**

## Get in touch

- 📧 [pentest101@protonmail.com](mailto:pentest101@protonmail.com)
- 🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-m-1a6023a6/)
- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/kader-xai)
